output.final_deliverable:
- (1) H1 text from example.com: "Example Domain" (source: https://example.com)
- (2) External link on example.com points to domain: www.iana.org (href: https://www.iana.org/domains/example) (source: https://example.com)
- (3) URL citations: https://example.com; https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
output.action_summary: Visited https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Extracted the H1 text 'Example Domain' from the example.com page. Found an external link on example.com that links to https://www.iana.org/domains/example, confirming the domain www.iana.org. Also visited the IANA Reserved Domains page at https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Citations included for each visited page.
